name: African Bird's Eye Chili
description: Small but mighty. These hand-picked chilies deliver the authentic 'African Heat' Green Deli is known for.

name: Ground Earth Turmeric
description: Grown in rich Ugandan soil, our turmeric is ground to a fine powder, retaining its natural oils and vibrant earth-brown hue.

name: Smoked Paprika Flakes
description: Slow-smoked over local hardwood to bring a deep, rustic flavor to any stews or meats.

name: Habenero Heat Dust
description: A concentrated burst of flavor. Perfect for those who want heat without changing the texture of the dish.
